title: Remote and Hybrid Work Policy: Eligibility and Expectations
text:
Q: What are the eligibility criteria and expectations for remote and hybrid work at our company?
A: Employees may be eligible for remote or hybrid work arrangements based on their job role, performance, and departmental needs. To apply, employees should submit a formal request to their direct manager at least 30 days prior to the desired start date. Managers will review requests based on team dynamics and operational requirements. Expectations for remote and hybrid work include maintaining regular communication with team members, attending scheduled meetings, and meeting performance goals. Employees are expected to be available during core business hours, which are from 9 AM to 5 PM, unless otherwise agreed upon. For any questions or clarifications regarding the policy, employees can reach out to the HR department at hr@company.com. Please refer to the employee handbook for more detailed guidelines and procedures.
